name: Twenty CRM MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Twenty — the modern open-source CRM built as a Salesforce alternative. Enables AI agents to manage contacts, companies, deals, and sales pipelines in Twenty CRM. Supports creating records, querying sales data, updating deal stages, and building AI-driven sales workflows on top of the self-hosted CRM.
use_cases: Managing contacts and company records in Twenty from sales automation agents
Updating deal stages and pipeline data from AI sales assistants
Querying CRM data for revenue reporting and forecasting agents
Building AI-powered sales workflow automation on Twenty's open-source CRM
not_for: Teams using Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, or other commercial CRMs
Organizations requiring enterprise CRM features not yet in Twenty
Teams without a self-hosted or cloud Twenty instance
best_when: A sales team or startup using Twenty as their CRM wants AI agents to automate contact management, deal tracking, and sales workflows — leveraging Twenty's open API and modern architecture.
avoid_when: You use established commercial CRMs. Twenty is a strong open-source alternative but lacks some enterprise features. Community MCP — verify against your Twenty version.

auth.notes: Twenty API key required. Generated from Twenty workspace settings. Twenty uses GraphQL API with token authentication.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Twenty is free open source (AGPL). Self-hosted or Twenty Cloud available.
pricing.paid_tiers: Twenty Cloud has hosted paid tiers; self-hosted is free
pricing.notes: Twenty is free and open source (AGPL). MCP server is free open source. Infrastructure costs for self-hosting apply.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted: no rate limits; Twenty Cloud limits by plan

known_agent_gotchas: Twenty uses GraphQL with cursor pagination — different from REST CRM APIs
Twenty is actively developed with frequent releases — API may change; pin versions
CRM data is business-critical — review agent write permissions before autonomous operation
Community MCP — not from Twenty official org; verify against current Twenty API
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRM data is business-sensitive (contacts, deals, revenue). API key authentication. HTTPS to Twenty instance. GDPR compliance depends on hosting configuration. Review data export/access permissions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Business CRM data. API key authentication. Self-hosted GDPR compliance. Review contact data handling.
